body: For example reasons themeselves like: ``` 🚫 Причина: Disk usage is 91% (threshold: 90%) ``` Should be fully translated in Russian. Here also not fully translated (ещё нужно исправить: Информация о версии -> Информация о версиях): ``` 🤖 Информация о версии 🤖 Hive-Mind • Version: 1.69.7 🎭 AI Agents • Claude Code: 2.1.138 • Agent CLI: 0.23.0 • OpenAI Codex: 0.130.0 • OpenCode: 1.14.48 • Qwen Code: 0.15.10 • Gemini CLI: 0.41.2 • GitHub Copilot: 1.0.44 📦 JavaScript/Node.js • Node.js: v20.20.2 • Bun: 1.3.13 • Deno: 2.7.14 Zip: 3.0 (2008-07-05) • Unzip: 6.00 (2009-04-20) • Expect: 5.45.4 • Screen: 4.09.01 (2023-08-20) • Xvfb: 21.1.12 💻 Platform • Environment: docker container • Architecture: AMD64 (x86-64) • OS: Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS • Kernel: Linux 6.8.0-94-generic ``` Platform, Environment, Development Tools, Browsers and so on are not translated. Product/tech/components/languages can be kept as is. Help in russian does not work at all, so we need to detect this error, and give message that error detected with fallback to plain text, and that should be done for all message sends, so we never see that error again, it should be automatically detected, and workarounded, so we can show user at least something, and yet will give warning, that there formating error happened with all --verbose logging in the hive-telegram-bot. Here also not all translated (reasons, dates, time expressions, quque details and so on): ``` 📊 Лимиты использования Текущее время: May 12, 12:34pm UTC CPU ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓░░░│░░░░░░░░░ 55% использовано 3.32/6 используемых ядер CPU RAM ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓░░░│░░░░░░░░░ 56% использовано 6.6/11.7 GB использовано Дисковое пространство ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓│░░ 91% ⚠️ 87.7/95.8 GB использовано GitHub API ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓░░░░░░░│░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 27% использовано 1363/5000 запросов Сброс через 4m (May 12, 12:38pm UTC) 5-часовой сеанс Claude ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 25% прошло ▓▓░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░│░░░░░░░░░ 6% использовано Сброс через 3h 45m (May 12, 4:20pm UTC) Текущая неделя (все модели) ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓░░░░░░░░░ 71% прошло ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓░░░░░░│ 76% использовано Сброс через 2d 1h 25m (May 14, 2:00pm UTC) Текущая неделя (только Sonnet) ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓░░░░░░░░░ 71% прошло ▓▓▓░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░│ 9% использовано Сброс через 2d 1h 25m (May 14, 2:00pm UTC) Лимиты Codex План: pro 5-часовой сеанс Codex ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓░░░░░░░░░░ 67% прошло ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓░░░░░░│░░░░░░░░░ 46% использовано Сброс через 1h 38m (May 12, 2:13pm UTC) Текущая неделя (все модели) ▓▓░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 7% прошло ▓▓▓░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░│ 10% использовано Сброс через 6d 12h 46m (May 19, 1:20am UTC) Дополнительные лимиты Codex GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark: сеанс 0%, неделя 0% Кредиты Codex 0 баланс Queues claude (pending: 0, processing: 0) agent (pending: 0, processing: 0) codex (pending: 0, processing: 5) qwen (pending: 0, processing: 0) gemini (pending: 0, processing: 0) ``` Double check all other supported languages are covered as well. And all other UI elements in telegram bot and GitHub comments, UI elements, that triggered by our system should be automatically adhere to detected language of the user in Telegram. But not prompts, prompts should be only if --auto-language is enabled. We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code. Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Translation to Russian is not fully implemented
